worker_role: Agent C - Unified Package + Economic Handoff

cycles.tweak: Canonical dedupe by (canonical_document_key, content_hash) with stable precedence in package builder.
cycles.before_after_or_blocker: Before duplicate candidates could inflate evidence counts; after one card is emitted per canonical artifact hash.
cycles.impact_on_package_quality: Prevents double-counting and hardens unified package identity.
cycles.next_tweak: Propagate provenance hash to storage refs.

cycles.tweak: Added content_hash propagation for Postgres/MinIO/pgvector storage refs.
cycles.before_after_or_blocker: Before storage refs were hash-light; after each ref carries canonical content hash when available.

cycles.tweak: Builder manual audit note now includes dedupe count and provenance intent.
cycles.before_after_or_blocker: Before note was generic; after note includes canonical dedupe evidence.
cycles.next_tweak: Bind package identity in bridge run_context.

cycles.tweak: Bridge run_context now includes scope idempotency and package_identity block.
cycles.before_after_or_blocker: Before package identity was fragmented; after run-context has a canonical identity object.

cycles.tweak: Bridge emits storage proof mode and idempotent replay refs plus run_context proof_modes.
cycles.before_after_or_blocker: Before direct vs indirect proof mode was implicit; after proof mode is machine-readable.
cycles.impact_on_package_quality: Improves replay/readback interpretability in downstream read models.

cycles.tweak: Economics read model emits top-level economic_handoff_quality object.
cycles.before_after_or_blocker: Before handoff state was scattered; after one object summarizes readiness and binding.
cycles.impact_on_package_quality: Creates clear decision surface for downstream consumers.

cycles.tweak: Added mechanism_candidates, parameter_inventory, missing_parameters, assumption_needs, unsupported_claim_risks, recommended_next_action.
cycles.before_after_or_blocker: Before direct/indirect readiness and missing-data contracts were implicit; after they are explicit.
cycles.impact_on_package_quality: Improves mechanism readiness and assumption governance traceability.

cycles.tweak: Added secondary_research_needs projection tied to request_contract and canonical binding requirement.
cycles.before_after_or_blocker: Before secondary research existed as raw contract only; after readiness projection is explicit.
cycles.impact_on_package_quality: Improves fail-closed but actionable handoff behavior.

cycles.tweak: Added manual_audit_scaffold checklist mapped to D6/D7/D9/D11 with evidence refs.
cycles.before_after_or_blocker: Before manual review was free-form; after checklist is deterministic and gate-mapped.
cycles.next_tweak: Lock endpoint contract assertions in admin tests.

cycles.tweak: Admin read-model tests now assert new economic handoff and manual audit contract fields.
cycles.before_after_or_blocker: Before endpoint contract could regress silently; after tests enforce required fields.
cycles.impact_on_package_quality: Hardens admin/read-model truth for package handoff.
cycles.next_tweak: Run targeted regression and git diff check.
